26349.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Hyacinth Is Alarmed

31574.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Hyacinth Is Alarmed
31574.description: Richard forgets his wedding anniversary but then tells Hyacinth that he had a new alarm installed as an anniversary present, only he has forgotten the code.
